touches.ai_summary: Amanda Roberts submitted an inbound demo request through the website, expressing interest in automating their new customer onboarding process. Currently evaluating solutions to reduce manual handoffs between sales and customer success teams.
next_steps: Schedule discovery call to understand current workflow
Send calendar invite for next week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent confirming discovery call scheduled for Thursday at 2pm ET. Included agenda covering current onboarding challenges, team structure, and success metrics. Amanda confirmed attendance.

questions_asked.question: Will we be able to see a demo during the call?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we'll do a tailored walkthrough based on your onboarding workflow

next_steps: Prepare discovery call focusing on onboarding automation use case

touches.ai_summary: Pre-call email sent with discovery call agenda and request for Amanda to share current onboarding documentation if available. Amanda replied confirming she'll have their process map ready to discuss.
next_steps: Review EchoConnect's website and LinkedIn to understand their client base

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Amanda Roberts covering EchoConnect's current manual onboarding process. They onboard 8-12 new marketing clients monthly, with heavy email coordination between sales and account managers. Amanda mentioned they're also evaluating Chorus but likes our automation focus. Team of 5 would use the platform. No other stakeholders mentioned yet.

questions_asked.question: How does your unlimited automation tier differ from the standard plan?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited allows custom workflow triggers and multi-step sequences without caps, while standard limits you to 10 active automations

questions_asked.question: Who else on your team would be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Right now it's mainly me driving this, but our VP of Operations would need to sign off on the budget

questions_asked.question: Can we integrate with our existing CRM and project management tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with all major CRMs and can connect to most PM tools via API

next_steps: Send proposal for 5-seat unlimited automation plan
Request intro to VP of Operations for technical validation

touches.ai_summary: Quick follow-up call to address Amanda's questions about implementation timeline and training requirements. Confirmed 2-week implementation window works for their Q2 planning. Amanda mentioned VP of Operations is busy but she can handle the technical evaluation herself.

questions_asked.question: How much training does the team typically need to get up to speed?
questions_asked.answer: Most teams are productive within 3-5 days with our onboarding program and template library

next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing breakdown
Include case study from similar-sized marketing agency

touches.ai_summary: Sent formal proposal for 5-seat unlimited automation plan at $4,800 ACV with implementation timeline and ROI projections based on their current onboarding volume. Included case study from comparable agency customer. Amanda acknowledged receipt and said she'll review with her team.
next_steps: Schedule follow-up to address any proposal questions
Prepare discount justification if pricing becomes an issue

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking in on proposal review. Amanda responded that pricing is slightly higher than Chorus quote and asked if there's flexibility. Also mentioned she's still the main point of contact and will loop in VP of Operations once they're further along.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the annual price for the unlimited tier?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with my manager and schedule a call to go through the pricing structure and value comparison

next_steps: Get approval for potential discount if needed

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call focused on pricing comparison with Chorus. Amanda shared that Chorus quoted $4,200 for similar functionality. Discussed differentiation around unlimited automation capabilities and implementation support. Amanda expressed concern about getting VP sign-off without a more competitive price. Agreed to 10% discount bringing ACV to $4,320 if they can close by end of month.

questions_asked.question: What exactly are we getting with unlimited automation that Chorus doesn't offer?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited custom triggers, multi-step branching logic, and no caps on active workflows - Chorus limits you to 15 automations on their comparable tier

questions_asked.question: Would the discounted price help you move forward without needing additional stakeholder approvals?
questions_asked.answer: It definitely helps, but I'll still need to get final approval from our VP before signing

questions_asked.question: If we sign by end of month, when could we realistically go live?
questions_asked.answer: We could start implementation the first week of next month and have you fully operational within two weeks

objections: Pricing is higher than competitive quote from Chorus
next_steps: Send revised proposal at $4,320 ACV with end-of-month close deadline
Request meeting with VP of Operations to finalize

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up negotiation call to finalize terms. Amanda confirmed the $4,320 pricing works for her budget but mentioned VP of Operations is tied up with a client project and she hasn't been able to schedule time with them yet. Asked if we could extend the discount deadline by one week. Discussed contract terms and confirmed 5 seats with unlimited automation tier. Amanda committed to getting VP approval by next Friday.

questions_asked.question: Can we extend the end-of-month deadline by one week given our VP's schedule?
questions_asked.answer: I can extend to the first week of next month, but we'd need commitment that you can get final approval by then

questions_asked.question: Is there anything specific the VP will need to see or any concerns we should address proactively?
questions_asked.answer: They'll mainly want to understand the technical integration requirements and confirm ROI projections

questions_asked.question: What does the payment structure look like - is it full annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We offer either annual upfront or quarterly payments with a 5% premium on the quarterly option

objections: VP of Operations hasn't been engaged yet and timeline is slipping
next_steps: Send extended proposal valid through first week of next month
Prepare technical overview doc for VP of Operations review
Schedule checkpoint call for next Friday
